title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
